title: cordia ochnacea
intro: Cordia ochnacea, also known as the Wild Plum or Plumera, is a plant species belonging to the bignonia family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cordia ochnacea include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health, among others. Cordia ochnacea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
